emails.subject: Re: WEEKLY CONFERENCE CALL - DATE CHANGE
emails.body: Re: WEEKLY CONFERENCE CALL DATE CHANGE I can't make the call on Thursday. I'm not sure that Sheila can either. I'll leave the go/no go Enron vote to Sheila. Kay From: Suzanne Adams@ECT on 06/05/2001 03:16 PM

emails.body: Sheila is being held hostage and the guys know that, but they want to have the call anyway. Kay Mann@ENRON 06/06/2001 07:30 AM
